name: Mogari Shishikuno
description: __Height:__ 174 cm While unable to see ghosts, Mogari has the ability to forcibly exorcise them by consuming them. By touching or being touched by another person with spiritual powers, like Kaoru or Kotaro, he can temporarily borrow their own spiritual abilities and share that gift among those who are spiritually sensitive. name: Natsu Takasaki
description: Natsu Takasaki, also known as Natchan, is the main female protagonist. She is a member of Southern Tennis Club, and studies in the same year and high school as Maruo. She is aiming to become a professional player.

name: Poko
description: Poko is a mysterious young boy who was first seen sleeping inside an old, large cauldron at now-closed Tawara family's Udon place by Souta Tawara. When Poko woke up and saw Souta, he became startled and ran away from him while holding with a bag of flour. However, Poko soon becomes fond of Souta, who kindly makes Udon for the hungry young boy. Now, Poko lives together with Souta at his old family house in Kagawa. ~!Poko actually is a bake-danuki (raccoon dog).!~

name: Sakura Mizukami
description: A first-year and a pink-haired tomboy. Her element is "Water", and she carries around a water bottle at all times. Her combat method includes pouring water on her hands, or forcing water down an opponent's throat. She later starts referring Kenji as her big brother, while Noe as her little sister, despite the denial from both. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Sara da Odin
description: A princess from another world that is proficient in magic. After her homeland gets destroyed, she flees to modern Japan through a magic portal. Influenced by manga, she aspires to become a great detective.

description: Tatsuru Miyazumi is an employee of Sunlight Beverage. He works in the Sales Department and is also the captain of their corporate badminton team. As Mikoto Shiratori's doubles partner, he usually handles power plays and defence from his position in the back court.

description: Captain of the soft tennis club, he was the only one on the team who earnestly tried to play in matches until he recruited Maki to be his partner.

name: Vorona
description: Vorona is a Russian assassin. She made her first kill at the age of 10 and after training under Simon and Dennis, was employed in a weapon dealing organization led by Lingerin Douglanikov and his collaborator, her father Dracon.

description: Yuu is a 17-year-old boy with a short stature. He possesses striking red hair and red eyes. Despite being described as average, his most notable feature is his handsome and beautiful face, which he inherited from his mother, Subaru Ayase. Yuu is a naturally kind and caring boy, always willing to help the Mikadono Sisters and those in need, even if it means butting into their business. name: Akira Touya
description: Hikaru's biggest rival and Kaio Middle School student. The son of Koyo Toya, Akira is already a very strong Go player when Hikaru first begins playing and is amazed by Hikaru's seemingly impossible strength. Since his first game with Hikaru, Akira has been obsessed with discovering the secret behind his strength. Akira has faced Hikaru again and won, but still sees a lot of strength within him. As the series progresses, they continue to play each other, but it always ends in an argument.
